nasb.text: There was a great famine in Samaria; and behold, they besieged it, until a donkey’s head was sold for eighty shekels of silver, and a fourth of a kab of dove’s dung for five shekels of silver.

esv.text: And there was a great famine in Samaria, as they besieged it, until a donkey’s head was sold for eighty shekels of silver, and the fourth part of a kab of dove’s dung for five shekels of silver.

cnv.text: 於是撒瑪利亞發生了極大的饑荒，敵軍繼續包圍，以致一個驢頭要賣九百克銀子，兩百克的鴿子糞也值六十克銀子。

ccb.text: 撒玛利亚被困后，城里陷入严重饥荒，以致一个驴头可卖九百克银子，二百克鸽子粪可卖十一克银子。
